banner.title: Cookie Settings
banner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. Essential cookies are always active. You can choose to enable or disable analytics cookies.
banner.essentialDescription: Required for the platform to function. Always active.
banner.analyticsDescription: Google Analytics — helps us understand how the platform is used.

settings.title: Privacy & Consent
settings.description: Manage your cookie and privacy consent settings.
settings.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke consent for analytics cookies?
settings.essentialDescription: Necessary for the platform to function

dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.description: GDPR / LGPD — Consent state and deletion requests

export.title: Export My Data
export.description: Export all your personal data in JSON format, as per your right to data portability (GDPR Art. 20 / LGPD Art. 18). Includes profile, properties, reservations, expenses, owners, and consent records.
export.limitError: Limit reached: maximum 1 export per day.
export.genericError: Error exporting data. Please try again.

deletion.title: Delete My Account
deletion.description: By deleting your account, all personal data will be removed or anonymized after a 30-day period. Financial data is retained as per legal obligation (GDPR/LGPD).
deletion.pendingDescription: Your account will be deleted on {{date}}. All personal data will be anonymized. Financial data is retained per legal obligation.
deletion.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

confirmList.coolingOff: Deletion will be performed after 30 days (reflection period)
confirmList.cancelAnytime: You can cancel at any time during this period
confirmList.anonymization: Personal data will be anonymized (name, email, phone)
confirmList.retention: Financial data will be retained for tax obligations
confirmList.audit: Consent and audit records are maintained
confirmList.recommendExport: We recommend exporting your data before continuing

deletion.errorPending: A deletion request is already pending.
deletion.successRequest: Deletion request registered. Your account will be deleted in 30 days.
